steps.t: The two Rohirrim soldiers can be found in Garsfeld proper, and Gísling is inside the Mead Hall. Gísil wants you to speak to his men and his son, Gísli…
The two Rohirrim soldiers can be found in Garsfeld proper, and Gísling is inside the Mead Hall. Gísil wants you to speak to his men and his son, Gísli…
The two Rohirrim soldiers can be found in Garsfeld proper, and Gísling is inside the Mead Hall. Gísil wants you to speak to his men and his son, Gísli…
Gísil can be found inside the Mead Hall of Garsfeld. You should return to Gísil with the opinions of his counsellors.
